reviews.review_description:
The experience is terrible, the game is very laggy and you can't even set the difficulty on a higher level.
Also the refund was not accepted and I barely played 15 minutes total.
The game is glitchy. You can't see the objects to hit, the objects of impact move too fast.
In single-player mode, I feel relaxed and at ease while still getting a workout. When will online multiplayer be available? I love making friends, and being able to connect online would be perfect.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We will consider adding multiplayer modes and leaderboards in future updates, which may also involve corresponding adjustments to the pricing. We are truly grateful for your early support and feedback, and we will be offering special surprise gifts to all early adopters at that time.

reviews.review_description: Amazing! It's the first time I've seen this type of music game

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback on the game experience. We have updated the levels and added more music tracks. We welcome your in-depth experience and feedback.
